name: io.lumen/lumen
description: Self-hostable, agentic-AI LMS — expose Lumen's catalog, RAG tutor, FSRS review queue, AI authoring pipeline, and multi-modal ingest as MCP tools so Claude can plan, teach, and create courses on a real product.

stdio.description: Mint a token with `make mcp-token` on the Lumen instance; paste the printed secret into the Claude Desktop config's env block.

install.claude_code: claude mcp add lumen -- python -m app.mcp --transport stdio

tools.name: list_courses
tools.description: List Lumen courses in the public catalog. Optional `filter` does free-text search over title + overview.

tools.name: get_course
tools.description: Fetch one course by slug. Returns the full syllabus tree (modules + lessons) plus the course overview.

tools.name: search_lesson_content
tools.description: Semantic search across a course's lesson chunks. Returns the top-K most similar passages with their lesson titles and pgvector cosine-distance scores (lower = better).

tools.name: ask_tutor
tools.description: Ask the Lumen course tutor a question. Returns a cited answer or a refusal if the course content doesn't cover the topic. Requires enrollment in the course.

tools.name: list_my_due_reviews
tools.description: Spaced-repetition queue for the calling user: cards whose FSRS-6 due-at has passed. Returns at most `limit` rows (default 20), oldest-due first.

tools.name: grade_review_card
tools.description: Submit one FSRS-6 rating against a review card. `rating` is 1=again, 2=hard, 3=good, 4=easy. Updates the card's stability + difficulty + next due-at.

tools.name: create_course_draft
tools.description: Generate a course outline from a one-paragraph brief and persist it as a draft course owned by the calling instructor. Lesson bodies are placeholders the instructor fills in via the studio.

tools.name: ingest_url_to_draft
tools.description: Import a YouTube / Notion / Google Docs URL into a draft course. Creates a fresh course when `course_id` is omitted, otherwise appends the ingest payload's modules + lessons to the existing course.

tools.name: list_my_progress
tools.description: Per-enrolled-course completion + mastery rollup for the calling user. Returns one row per active enrollment, newest enrolment first.
